2606.31650.title: ECHO: Prune to act, trace to learn with selective turn memory in agentic RL
2606.31650.paper_summary: Long-horizon language agents must repeatedly interact with tools, accumulate evidence, and make decisions under bounded context windows. Existing context-management methods make such rollouts feasible by truncating distant history, folding past turns into summaries, or selecting compact memory states. However, these breakthroughs introduce two coupled limitations. First, as the number of turns grows, historical observations are progressively removed or collapsed into compressed states, making it harder for the policy to reuse fine-grained evidence. Second, once the original turns are no longer source-addressable, outcome-based RL loses an explicit path for aligning policy updates with the evidence that supported a successful final answer. To this end, we propose ECHO, a selective turn-memory framework that jointly addresses history collapse and traceable learning through source-indexed reconstruction. Specifically, ECHO compresses each completed environment turn into a compact memory record, reconstructs bounded policy contexts by selecting from these records, and reuses the selected source indices to route positive outcome credit to the evidence and selection actions that support successful answers. On BrowseComp-Plus, ECHO reaches 43.4% held-out accuracy, outperforming GRPO (28.9%) and the rolling-summary baseline SUPO (36.1%), while using fewer turns and lower trajectory volume than SUPO (Figure 1). Additionally, the trained policy improves zero-shot generalization across multi-objective QA, code generation, and deep information-seeking benchmarks on both dense and MoE backbones.
2606.31650.paper_summary_zh: 長期語言代理必須不斷與工具互動、累積證據，並在有限的上下文窗口下做出決策。現有的上下文管理方法通過截斷遙遠的歷史、將過去的回合折疊成摘要或選擇緊湊的記憶狀態，使這些展開變得可行。然而，這些突破引入了兩個相互關聯的限制。首先，隨著回合數的增長，歷史觀察逐漸被移除或壓縮成壓縮狀態，這使得策略更難重用細粒度的證據。其次，一旦原始回合不再可尋址，基於結果的強化學習失去了將策略更新與支持成功最終答案的證據對齊的明確途徑。為此，我們提出ECHO，一個選擇性回合記憶框架，通過源索引重建共同解決歷史壓縮和可追溯學習。具體來說，ECHO將每個完成的環境回合壓縮為緊湊的記憶記錄，通過從這些記錄中選擇來重建有限的策略上下文，並重用所選的源索引將正向結果信譽路由到支持成功答案的證據和選擇行動上。在BrowseComp-Plus上，ECHO達到了43.4%的保留準確率，超過了GRPO（28.9%）和滾動摘要基線SUPO（36.1%），同時使用的回合數和軌跡量均低於SUPO（圖1）。此外，訓練後的策略在多目標問答、代碼生成和深度信息尋求基準測試中改善了零樣本泛化，無論是在密集還是MoE骨幹上。
2606.31650.author: Zijun Xie et.al.
2606.31650.authors: Zijun Xie, Binbin Zheng, Enlei Gong, Jihua Liu, Yuyang You, Lingfeng Liu, Jiayao Tang, Guanqun Zhao, Aoqi Hu, Zeyu Chen
